description: Concurrent use of warfarin and aspirin significantly increases the risk of major bleeding
Metformin should be temporarily discontinued before iodinated contrast procedures due to risk of lactic acidosis
Erythromycin inhibits CYP3A4 metabolism of simvastatin, greatly increasing risk of rhabdomyolysis
ACE inhibitors increase potassium retention; concurrent potassium supplementation may cause hyperkalemia
Combined serotonergic activity increases risk of serotonin syndrome
Ciprofloxacin inhibits theophylline metabolism, monitor theophylline levels closely
